label: Release changelog (Markdown)
content:
# Changelog

## 2.1.0 — 2026-06-30

### Added
- Dark mode across all dashboards.
- CSV export on the reports page.

### Fixed
- Share links no longer expire an hour early in some time zones.
- Fixed a crash when uploading files over 20 MB.

## 2.0.1 — 2026-06-12

### Fixed
- Corrected billing totals for annual plans.
